positive: A mystical forest scene at twilight, featuring a pair of stylized, bioluminescent deer traversing a moss-covered path. The composition must be centralized, showcasing the deer against a dramatic, deeply saturated twilight sky and dense foliage. Use a highly stylized neo-art deco aesthetic mixed with nature elements. The color palette should focus on deep emerald greens, rich sapphire blues, ethereal lavender, and brilliant pops of neon teal for the bioluminescence. Strong backlighting and volumetric lighting are crucial to make the deer silhouettes pop against the glowing forest background. Perfect for a clean, symmetrical apparel print with high contrast.
